task: 10-round v4 evidence-based deep dig per Mr.Long '10 lan tiếp tục đào sâu fix triệt để bug'

real_bugs_found_and_fixed.class: Migration FK target column missing + integration test seed missing NOT NULL fields
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.before: 003 inventory.player_id REFERENCES players(player_id); 001 players has NO player_id column (only id BIGSERIAL PK + username/email/password_hash NOT NULL). Integration test seed INSERT INTO players (player_id, gold)... missing 3 NOT NULL fields.
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.after: 003 ALTER players ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS player_id VARCHAR(64) + UPDATE backfill from username + DO block to add UNIQUE constraint idempotently. Down migration mirrors. Integration test seed includes username/email/password_hash.
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.trigger: would fail on migration 003 apply: ERROR column player_id does not exist; would fail integration test seed: null value in column username violates not-null constraint
real_bugs_found_and_fixed.why_not_caught_earlier: pg-mem unit tests bypass real 001 (use hand-crafted minimal table); DSN-gated integration suite never executed (no PG_TEST_DSN). v4 R7 explicitly cross-referenced 001 schema against 003 REFERENCES + integration seed.

rounds_clean.R2_concurrent_AD12_rollback: safe (SERIALIZABLE + FOR UPDATE; 2nd caller sees rolled_back → previously_rolled_back=true cache)
rounds_clean.R3_ROLLBACK_on_executor_throw: safe (INSERT inside BEGIN; ROLLBACK undoes; never visible)
rounds_clean.R5_AD12_re_rollback_target_state: safe (does NOT mutate transaction_log on rolled_back path)
rounds_clean.R8_scheduler_lower_bound_guard: Math.max(60_000, nextDelay) present (was scanner v3 FP)

verification_post_fix.R7_structural_rescan: 003 has ALTER ADD + UPDATE backfill + DO UNIQUE block; integration seed has 5-col INSERT

tally_cumulative_5_sessions.session_5_v4_concurrency_schema: 10 rounds, 1 fixed (1 CRITICAL: FK target missing)
tally_cumulative_5_sessions.grand_total: 55 rounds, 12 real bugs found + 12 fixed (2 CRITICAL)
